heroSkillRows.name: HP Up
heroSkillRows.description: Increase your hero's Max HP.

heroSkillRows.name: Poison Mist
heroSkillRows.description: Create a poisonous mist that inflicts damage on all surrounding enemies.

heroSkillRows.name: Defense Stance
heroSkillRows.description: Command your soldiers to take a defensive stance.

heroSkillRows.name: Dodge
heroSkillRows.description: Create a chance of evading the enemy's attack.

heroSkillRows.name: Shuriken
heroSkillRows.description: Throw a giant shuriken that pushes an enemy backward with a shock wave.

heroSkillRows.name: Berserk
heroSkillRows.description: Increase the Attack Speed of surrounding units.

heroSkillRows.name: Shuriken
heroSkillRows.description: Increase your hero's  Long-ranged Attack Strength, even while defending the tower.

heroSkillRows.name: Lotus Blizzard
heroSkillRows.description: Throw a flurry of blades.

heroSkillRows.name: Charge
heroSkillRows.description: Increase the Movement Speed of surrounding units.

heroSkillRows.name: Assassinate
heroSkillRows.description: Create a chance of finishing an enemy with one hit.

heroSkillRows.name: Repair
heroSkillRows.description: Repair your tower to restore its HP.

heroSkillRows.name: Wave
heroSkillRows.description: Muster energy to attack. Increase Movement and Attack Strengths at the cost of your entire Defense.

heroSkillRows.name: Snatch
heroSkillRows.description: Use your hero to kill an enemy and steal mana. The higher the Skill Level is, the more mana stolen.

heroSkillRows.name: Smoke
heroSkillRows.description: Create smoke in front of your tower to incapacitate the enemy.

heroSkillRows.name: Draft
heroSkillRows.description: Draft soldiers to reduce Respawn Delay.

heroSkillRows.name: Build Tower
heroSkillRows.description: Increase your tower's Defense.

heroSkillRows.name: Bomb
heroSkillRows.description: Throw a bomb that pushes enemies backward with damage.

heroSkillRows.name: Align
heroSkillRows.description: Send Melee units to the front and the Long-ranged to the back.

heroSkillRows.name: Defend Tower
heroSkillRows.description: Attack with shurikens while in the tower. Increase this skill's Level to increase Attack Speed.

heroSkillRows.description: Drop lightning to inflict damage to the entire enemy.

heroSkillRows.description: Increase the damage and range of Long-ranged units.

findings: Dispatch is the clearest multi-slot ladder: slots 20/21/22 each carry one Dispatch row, one active row, and one triggerMode=2 buff-tail row.
Tower defense is hero-specific: Defend Tower master rows span slots 6/13/23 while the passive side resolves to Thief/Helba/Juno Tower Defense aliases.
Slot 11 is a shared-slot hybrid: multiple named hero-skill rows collapse onto one active row and the same buff-tail bundle.
Slot 14 is a shared-slot hybrid: multiple named hero-skill rows collapse onto one active row and the same buff-tail bundle.
Slot 15 is a shared-slot hybrid: multiple named hero-skill rows collapse onto one active row and the same buff-tail bundle.
Special slots [29, 30, 31] still sit outside the passive/active row range and remain best treated as event-only or buff-only commands.
Active row 24 remains the only orphan active-runtime row not currently reached by any hero-skill slot.
